title: Aezhu kurukku rendu nadukku Lyrics Inam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Yezhu kurukku Rendu Nadukku
Singer: Resmi Sateesh
Movie: Inam
Music: Vishal C
Lyrics: Charukesh

Aezhu kurukku rendu nadukku
naalu peru vaaganam.
enna kaatchu oru naalukku
neeyum thaaney poganum
naanum thaaney poganum
naama sandhosama vazhanum

Aezhu kurukku rendu nadukku
naalu peru vaaganam.

Naalu madi kaaranam
poradhu paadathaan.
naadhiyaththa naangalum
povadhu melathaan. (2)

Pogum vazhi padhayellaam onnuthaan
Pogum vazhi padhayellaam onnuthaan
angae pona pinne sondham
namakku mannuthaan.

Sonnaa kelunga..idhu unmai thaanunga
Sonnaa kelunga..idhu unmai thaanunga

Aezhu kurukku rendu nadukku
naalu peru vaaganam.
enna kaatchu oru naalukku
neeyum thaaney poganum
naanum thaaney poganum
ayya poye thaana theeranum
naama sandhosama vazhanum

Aezhu kurukku rendu nadukku
naalu peru vaaganam.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for the song Aezhu Kurukku Rendu Nadukku?

The music was composed by Vishal C.

What is the theme of the song?

The song conveys themes of resilience and hope amidst challenges.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by Charukesh.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Inam?

The lead roles were portrayed by S. Karan and Sugandha Ram.

When was the movie Inam released?

The movie was released in the year 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Aezhu Kurukku Rendu Nadukku from the movie Inam (2014) is a melodious and emotional piece composed by Vishal C with lyrics by Charukesh. Featuring the voices of Resmi Sateesh, the song reflects themes of resilience and hope amidst adversity. The movie, starring S. Karan and Sugandha Ram, portrays the struggles and aspirations of its characters. This song is a testament to the power of music in conveying profound emotions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aezhu Kurukku Rendu Nadukku, a poignant melody from the movie Inam, captures the essence of emotional resilience and hope. Composed by Vishal C with lyrics by Charukesh, this song resonates deeply with its soothing tune and heartfelt lyrics. Experience the profound emotions conveyed through this masterpiece.
stanzaMeanings: Seven paths, two directions, four people are traveling. Both you and I should go our own way, and we should live happily.
Seven paths, two directions, four people are traveling.
The reason for the four sides is the song. We too should go towards the north.
The way we go is the same for everyone. The way we go is the same for everyone. Wherever we go, we will have our own land.
Listen to what I say.. this is the truth. Listen to what I say.. this is the truth.
Seven paths, two directions, four people are traveling. Both you and I should go our own way, and we should live happily, even if we have to part ways.
Seven paths, two directions, four people are traveling.
